headline: Analysts Remain Confident in Workday (WDAY)’s Outlook Amid Strong AI Momentum
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) earns a place in our list of the 8 most undervalued cloud stocks to buy according to analysts. As of March 20, 2026, 60% of analysts covering the stock retain bullish ratings for Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY), with a consensus price target of $180, indicating a 32.45% upside potential. headline: How The Workday (WDAY) Story Is Shifting Toward AI Investment And Slower Growth Expectations
summary: Workday’s revised fair value estimate shifts slightly, with the price target moving from US$184.73 to US$181.31. That subtle reset lines up with Street commentary that balances trimmed expectations with ongoing debate around growth, margins and how much weight to put on AI and leadership changes. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these updates and track the evolving Workday story in your own research process. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. headline: Is Workday (WDAY) Now Offering Value After A 48% One-Year Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether Workday's share price now lines up with its true worth, especially after a tough run for many software names. Workday's stock last closed at US$127.97, with returns of a 4.1% decline over 7 days, a 1.7% decline over 30 days, a 37.8% decline year to date, and a 47.7% decline over 1 year that may have some investors reassessing the balance between risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on Workday's position in enterprise software and how investors are reacting to...
